inputs.label: Number of Sidereal Days
inputs.businessContext: Quantity of sidereal days to convert to standard hours

inputs.label: Hours per Sidereal Day
inputs.businessContext: Hours component of one sidereal day

inputs.label: Minutes per Sidereal Day
inputs.businessContext: Minutes component of one sidereal day

inputs.label: Seconds per Sidereal Day
inputs.businessContext: Seconds component of one sidereal day

formulas.verboseResult: siderealDays + ' sidereal days = ' + (siderealDays * (hours + minutes/60 + seconds/3600)).toFixed(6) + ' hours'
